name: claude-managed-agents-cloudflare
description: Self-hosted Claude Managed Agent control plane on Cloudflare using the Sandbox SDK

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/ensure-kv.mjs && node scripts/ensure-d1.mjs && node scripts/sync-vpc-bindings.mjs && node scripts/copy-redoc.mjs

ENVIRONMENT_ID.description: Anthropic environment ID this Worker polls for work. Create a **Self-managed** environment in the [Claude Platform Console](https://platform.claude.com/workspaces/default/environments).

ANTHROPIC_ENVIRONMENT_KEY.description: Anthropic environment key (`sk-ant-oat01-...`) — the single credential the control plane uses to authenticate every call in the worker flow (poll, ack, heartbeat, force-stop, session event stream, skill download). Generated alongside the environment above.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key (`sk-ant-...`) — used to call the Managed Agents API (`/v1/agents`, `/v1/sessions`).

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: HMAC signing secret from the [Anthropic Console webhook settings](https://platform.claude.com/settings/workspaces/default/webhooks). Set the webhook URL to `https://<your-worker>.workers.dev/webhooks` after the first deploy completes.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Optional. Required only for the MicroVM snapshot system (R2 presigned URLs). Found in the URL of your Cloudflare dashboard. Skip if you're running Isolate-only sandboxes.

R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: Optional. Required only for the MicroVM snapshot system. [Mint an R2 access key](https://dash.cloudflare.com/r2/api-tokens/create?type=user) with read+write on the snapshots bucket and paste the Access Key ID.

R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: Optional. Secret half of the R2 access key above.

BACKUP_BUCKET_NAME.description: Optional. Name of the snapshots R2 bucket — must match the `bucket_name` set on the `BACKUP_BUCKET` binding in `wrangler.jsonc` (default: `claude-managed-agents-snapshots`).
